test.name: TC-001 Validar pagina publica desde Excel

kw.name: Cargar Variables De Excel
kw.msg: Variables cargadas desde variables.xlsx, hoja TC-001, fila de datos 1

kw.name: Iniciar Caso De Prueba
kw.msg: Reporte iniciado para: TC-001 Validar pagina publica desde Excel

kw.name: Abrir navegador
Open Browser
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

(chrome not reachable) (The process started from msedge location C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe is no longer running, so msedgedriver is assuming that msedge has crashed.)
